query: SELECT DATE(createdAt) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM establishments GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY dt ASC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT DATE(createdAt) as dt, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM establishments GROUP BY DATE(createdAt) ORDER BY dt ASC;
